epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Fasting plasma glucose ≥126 mg/dL or HbA1c ≥6.5% or 2h plasma glucose ≥200 mg/dL post-OGTT

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Aligned with ADA/IDF guidelines, adapted by SBD
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Lifestyle modification, metformin first-line, insulin as needed per SBD protocols
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Regional disparities in access, high obesity rates in North/Northeast, supply chain issues for insulin
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: National Diabetes Program (PNCD), free medication via SUS, strong SBD guidelines
